chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1551 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.6547/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 03.04.2025 Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing i.e. 23.11.2023, thereafter, no one has turned up to pursue the instant Constitutional Petition. The conduct of the petitioner and his Counsel prima-facie suggests that they are no more interested to proceed with the instant Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
